diagram_title: Preserve Unanswered User Messages Across Compaction Boundaries

activities.title: Snapshot Unanswered User Message
activities.description: Walk session messages stream backward, identify most-recent user message that has no completed assistant reply (assistant.finish ∉ {stop, tool-calls, length}); copy info + parts by spread; capture optional empty-assistant child id; emit observed-condition tag for downstream replay decision

activities.title: Write Compaction Anchor
activities.description: Existing compactWithSharedContext or tryLlmAgent inline write; produces summary-true assistant message with monotone ULID; resets codex chain via publishCompactedAndResetChain; surface kind + observed via eventMeta argument

activities.title: Replay Unanswered User Message
activities.description: If snapshot.id < anchor.id, generate fresh ULID monotonically larger than anchor; rewrite user message with new id and current timestamp; copy all parts with fresh part ids targeting new message id; remove original user message and optional empty-assistant child; idempotent under retry

activities.title: Decide Continue Injection
activities.description: Replace static INJECT_CONTINUE table with stream-driven runtime decision: if replayed=true → no Continue; if no user message exists post-anchor → inject synthetic Continue; if user message already exists post-anchor (e.g. /compact trigger) → skip Continue

activities.title: Emit Replay Telemetry
activities.description: Publish compaction.user_msg_replay event with {sessionID, step, observed, originalUserID, newUserID, anchorMessageID, hadEmptyAssistantChild, partCount, outcome, errorMessage?}; thread eventMeta into publishCompactedAndResetChain so recentEvents records observed/kind instead of unknown

arrows.label: observed condition (overflow / cache-aware / rebind / empty-response / provider-switched / continuation-invalidated / stall-recovery / manual / idle)
{snapshot.info, snapshot.parts, emptyAssistantID?} or undefined when none unanswered
summary text (sanitized) + chainBinding + serverCompactedItems? from kind chain
Cooldown.shouldThrottle gate; ULID monotonicity invariant; AGENTS.md rule 1 logging
compactWithSharedContext (compaction.ts:512); tryLlmAgent inline write (compaction.ts:1380); SQLite Session.updateMessage / Session.updatePart
replay outcome payload (replayed | skipped:already-after-anchor | skipped:no-unanswered | error)
post-anchor stream invariant: lastUser must exist when pre-condition was met
injectContinueAfterAnchor (compaction.ts:1867) refactored to runtime check; auto-mode branch in compactWithSharedContext (compaction.ts:601)
post-compaction messages stream with guaranteed unanswered user msg or synthetic Continue (drives next runloop iter)
bus event compaction.user_msg_replay; recentEvents ring buffer entry; debug.log line
